title: pleomele helferiana
intro: Pleomele helferiana, also known as the Hawaiian Ti or Cordyline, is a tropical plant species native to the Pacific Islands. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and combat infections. The health benefits of Pleomele helferiana include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce anxiety and stress, and act as an antioxidant. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves have been used in poultices to treat a variety of ailments.
